response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The audio phonetics partially match the JSON, but there were some clear deviations and missing segments. Specifically, the vocalization at 01:36 matches Aki Rosenthal shouting 'おちついてるよー' rather than the suggested JSON lyrics. 2. JSON Usage: The JSON was reference-only; manual transcription and translation were heavily used to capture AZKi's spoken English/Japanese commentary throughout the Minecraft gameplay. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timed subtitles precisely to AZKi's vocal starts and ends, handling rapid speech and hums with logical phrase splits.

subtitles.original: Oh, I could breed these two.
subtitles.english: Oh, I could breed these two.

subtitles.original: Okay, I can go sell these.
subtitles.english: Okay, I can go sell these.

subtitles.original: I'll leave the rares for now.
subtitles.english: I'll leave the rares for now.

subtitles.original: Maybe, maybe we will become the bee breeder.
subtitles.english: Maybe, maybe we will become the bee breeder.

subtitles.original: It's meant to be. We even have a theme song.
subtitles.english: It's meant to be. We even have a theme song.

subtitles.original: おちついてるよー！おちついてるよー！
I wasn't seeing what they were doing.
subtitles.english: I didn't see what they were doing.

subtitles.original: They leave a trace wherever they go.
subtitles.english: They leave a trace wherever they go.

subtitles.original: Oh, I can probably go sell these after.
subtitles.english: Oh, I can probably go sell these after.

subtitles.original: Leave it here. Don't need this, don't need this.
subtitles.english: I'll leave it here. Don't need this, don't need this.

subtitles.original: Oh yeah, I can make so much more...
subtitles.english: Oh yeah, I can make so much more...

subtitles.original: ...pies right now. Look at all these eggs I have!
subtitles.english: ...pies right now. Look at all these eggs I have!

subtitles.original: We're making so m... so many pumpkin pies. I choked on my spit.
subtitles.english: We're making so m... so many pumpkin pies. I choked on my spit.

subtitles.original: I'm so happy, my plan is working.
subtitles.english: I'm so happy, my plan is working.

subtitles.original: I totally forgot about the water!
subtitles.english: I totally forgot about the water!
